summary_en: 64,000 shares acquired on May 22, 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 at ¥28.9M. Cumulative progress under authorized program: 64,000 shares (32% of 200,000 share limit, 6.0% of S/O), ¥28.9M of ¥100M limit. Execution window: April 1 – September 30, 2026. Acquisition to continue.
title_en: Notice of Results of Acquisition of Treasury Shares via Off-Floor Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Sakurai Ltd. executed a buyback of 64,000 shares on May 22, 2026 via ToSTNeT-3 (off-floor transaction) for ¥28.9 million, average price approximately ¥451 per share. This transaction is part of an authorized buyback program approved by the board on March 31, 2026. The program authorizes acquisition of up to 200,000 shares (6.0% of shares outstanding) for up to ¥100 million during the period April 1 – September 30, 2026. As of the date of this notice, 64,000 shares have been acquired (32% of the share limit, 29% of the yen limit). The company states it will continue executing purchases under this program through September 30, 2026. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and enable flexible capital management in response to changing business conditions.
